favorite.preview: We've been examining how everyday equipment contributes to urban pollution this semester. A single gas-powered leaf blower can emit more hydrocarbons in one hour than a car driven several hundred miles.

A mosaic is a picture or pattern produced by fitting together many small pieces of colored stone, glass, or ceramic, known as tesserae.
Volcanism occurs when molten rock from deep inside the Earth rises and erupts onto the surface.
